calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Joinder In Plaintiff Keep America Safe And Beautiful Motion To Approve Proposed Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WOOD EXPRESSIONS INC.'S Joinder In Plaintiff Keep America Safe And Beautiful Motion To Approve Proposed Consent Judgment:

Granted. No opposition filed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
